name: j08_devanagari_services_speechact
notes: journey-sim-spec.md #8 — a services business (clinic/salon) with a catalog site + WhatsApp, owner texts in Devanagari / mixed script. Surface: language handling + speech-act classification across scripts (the negation / apostrophe / Devanagari-matra failure modes VT-329 hardened). Arc: a Devanagari cohort/status ask (answered in-register), then a Devanagari NEGATION after a draft ('अभी मत भेजो' = don't send yet) which must be read as a HOLD, not an approval. Tier-1 invariants: correct intent classification across scripts (the negation is NOT read as 'send'); no dropped speech-act; in-register reply. Hard proof: after the negation, expect_sent_count 0.

persona.business: a neighbourhood salon and skin clinic that books appointments over WhatsApp
persona.temperament: warm, speaks in Hindi, careful about messaging clients
persona.backstory: आप एक सैलून और स्किन क्लिनिक चलाती हैं। आप अपने पुराने ग्राहकों को वापस लाना चाहती हैं, लेकिन बिना सोचे-समझे कोई मैसेज नहीं भेजना चाहतीं।

persona_turn.goal: Hindi (Devanagari) mein poochhiye ki kitne purane customers ne kaafi samay se appointment nahi liya / wapas nahi aaye

steps.fallback_message: कितने पुराने ग्राहक हैं जो काफ़ी समय से वापस नहीं आए?
steps.note: A Devanagari count/status ask. Expect a grounded, in-register (Hindi) answer against the seeded 8-customer cohort — no dropped speech-act, no English-only fallback, no fabricated number. Judge verdicts language-match + grounding (Tier-2).

persona_turn.goal: Hindi mein kahiye ki un purane grahakon ke liye ek wapas-laane wala offer taiyaar karo — par abhi bhejna mat

steps.fallback_message: उन ग्राहकों के लिए एक ऑफ़र तैयार करो — पर अभी मत भेजो।
steps.note: Tier-1 speech-act across scripts: 'अभी मत भेजो' (don't send yet) is a HOLD, NOT an approval — the negation must be classified correctly (VT-329 Devanagari-safe) and NO send fires (expect_sent_count 0). A draft may be prepared, but nothing goes out. A send here is a dropped-negation / mis-classified-intent breaker.
